pull_quote: Allowing difficulty to be our teacher.
bio_short: Cary Keishin Brief guides practice in the Theravāda tradition, rooted in the Buddha's earliest teachings. The Sit Raleigh community meets weekly for sitting meditation, dharma talks, and the kind of open inquiry that both challenges and comforts.
bio_full:
Cary Keishin Brief has been practicing and teaching in the Theravāda Buddhist tradition for many years. He founded Sit Raleigh to offer accessible, donation-based practice to anyone in the Triangle area, regardless of background or experience.

The teaching is offered by dana — generosity — so that the Dhamma remains available to all.
